# Storage & Database Icons

## Storage (`#7AA116`)

### resourceIcon (service-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.<resIcon>`
Required: `fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=#ffffff`

| Display Name | resIcon |
|---|---|
| Storage | `storage` |
| S3 | `s3` |
| Elastic Block Store | `elastic_block_store` |
| Elastic File System | `elastic_file_system` |
| FSx | `fsx` |
| FSx for Lustre | `fsx_for_lustre` |
| FSx for NetApp ONTAP | `fsx_for_netapp_ontap` |
| FSx for OpenZFS | `fsx_for_openzfs` |
| FSx for Windows File Server | `fsx_for_windows_file_server` |
| S3 on Outposts | `s3_on_outposts_storage` |
| S3 Glacier | `glacier` |
| Backup | `backup` |
| Snowball | `snowball` |
| Snowball Edge | `snowball_edge` |
| Snowmobile | `snowmobile` |
| Snowcone | `snowcone` |
| Storage Gateway | `storage_gateway` |
| Elastic Disaster Recovery | `cloudendure_disaster_recovery` |
| EFS InfrequentAccess | `efs_infrequentaccess` |
| EFS Standard | `efs_standard` |
| File Cache | `file_cache` |
| Infrequent Access Storage Class | `infrequent_access_storage_class` |

| Standard IA | `standard_ia` |

| Backup Gateway | `backup_gateway` |
| File Gateway | `file_gateway` |

| S3 File Gateway | `s3_file_gateway` |

## Database (`#C925D1`)

### resourceIcon (service-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.<resIcon>`
Required: `fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=#ffffff`

| Display Name | resIcon |
|---|---|
| Database | `database` |
| Aurora | `aurora` |
| DocumentDB | `documentdb_with_mongodb_compatibility` |
| DynamoDB | `dynamodb` |
| ElastiCache | `elasticache` |
| Keyspaces | `keyspaces` |

| Neptune | `neptune` |
| Quantum Ledger Database | `quantum_ledger_database` |
| RDS | `rds` |
| RDS on VMware | `rds_on_vmware` |
| Redshift | `redshift` |
| Timestream | `timestream` |
| Database Migration Service | `database_migration_service` |
| Managed Apache Cassandra Service | `managed_apache_cassandra_service` |
| Oracle Database at AWS | `oracle_database_at_aws` |
